metadata.title: Bowling · Ramat Gan Branch
metadata.description: The perfect outing for family and friends! Modern bowling lanes, bar & restaurant, gymboree, bumper cars and events of all kinds — Ramat Gan branch.

notice.title: The bowling alley will be closed between 17:45–21:00
notice.body: Before and after we'll be open as usual :)

hero.description: An electric atmosphere until the small hours! Modern bowling lanes, bar & restaurant, gymboree, bumper cars and events of all kinds.
hero.address: Aba Hillel Rd 301 (Ramat Gan Stadium, Gate 2)

features.title: Modern lanes
features.desc: 14 lanes with pro equipment and LED lighting

features.title: For everyone
features.desc: From pros to beginners — fun for all ages

features.title: Open until 3:00
features.desc: Every day of the week, including weekends

items.title: Bowling
items.desc: Professional bowling lanes for all ages, with shoe and ball rental.

items.title: Events & Birthdays
items.desc: Ready-made packages with a dedicated host and a festive table for the perfect celebration.

items.title: Food & bar menu
items.desc: Meals, snacks and a range of drinks — served right to your lane.

pricing.eyebrow: Price per game per person · 10 frames
pricing.title: How much to play?
pricing.description: The price is per game (10 frames, ~2 throws per frame) per person. Play as many games as you like.
pricing.soldierNote: With a valid military ID. Conscript soldiers only.
pricing.birthdayDescription: An unforgettable celebration with ready-made packages, a professional production team and a cake ceremony. You celebrate — we take care of the rest.

bumpers.title: Bumper tubes
bumpers.desc: Please follow the safety instructions and the instructor. Use is at the participants' own responsibility.

reviews.title: What our guests say about us?

items.name: Tamar Yosef
items.quote: "The kids asked to come back the same week. Highly recommended!"

items.name: Itai Bar
items.quote: "A perfect birthday for my son. The production was smooth and the staff professional."

items.name: Ronit Cohen
items.quote: "A great place, we celebrated my son's birthday there! Professional staff, wonderful atmosphere."

contact.eyebrow: Leave us a message — we'll get back to you on working days
contact.title: Contact us
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what you'd like to know…

footer.tagline: Israel's leading bowling venue. Open every day.

accessibilityPage.title: Accessibility statement
accessibilityPage.intro: Bowling — Ramat Gan branch places great importance on providing equal, accessible service to all our customers, and works to make both the website and the physical venue accessible in accordance with the Equal Rights for Persons with Disabilities Law and its regulations, and the Israeli standard SI 5568 based on the WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.

sections.title: Website accessibility
items: The site can be navigated using the keyboard alone.
Hierarchical heading structure and alt text on images for screen readers.
High color contrast and text that can be enlarged up to 200% without loss of content.
Compatibility with common browsers and mobile devices.

sections.title: Physical venue accessibility
items: Accessible parking near the venue entrance.
Accessible entrance and passages for wheelchairs.
Our staff is happy to assist with any request or special need.

accessibilityPage.contactText: Ran into a difficulty browsing or visiting? We'd love to hear and fix it. You can reach our accessibility coordinator:

menuPage.title: Our menu
menuPage.subtitle: Fresh food from our kitchen, served right to your lane.
menuPage.note: * The menu is updated from time to time and may vary by season and availability.

items.name: Home fries
items.desc: Potato cubes fried in sweet chili

items.name: Shoshana's toast
items.desc: Sesame bagel with cheeses, garlic butter and thousand-island sauce

items.name: Mini pancakes
items.desc: With powdered sugar and mini Nutella

eventsPage.title: Events & Birthdays
eventsPage.subtitle: Choose the type of event that suits you — we'll be happy to help with every detail.

cards.title: Birthday at the bowling alley
cards.desc: A free-style birthday — a bowling game for all the kids, a dedicated host, a birthday table and a cake ceremony.

cards.title: Gym-birthday
cards.desc: A free hour at the gymboree, a meal in a private room and a cake ceremony — two hours of unforgettable fun.

cards.title: Birthday without a private room
cards.desc: A free-style birthday — a bowling game, a dedicated host, a birthday table and a cake ceremony, without a private room.

cards.title: Class outing
cards.desc: A team-building bowling game for the whole class, accompanied by refreshments and a meal served right on the lanes during play.

cards.title: Corporate events
cards.desc: From 12 participants up to a full venue buyout — buffet, tailored menu, alcohol and a club atmosphere.

included.title: What's included in every event?
items: A dedicated host throughout the event
A festive table and a cake ceremony
Unlimited pitchers of water and cordial
Bowling lanes with shoe and ball rental

cta.title: Ready to start planning?
cta.desc: Leave your details and we'll get back to you with all the options and prices for the perfect event.

eventDetails.extrasNote: All upgrades by prior arrangement only
eventDetails.policyNote: Worth reading before you reserve a date

form.title: Event confirmation form
form.desc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours to confirm the date and arrange the commitment form.
form.policyAgree: I have read and agree to the booking policy
form.submit: Send details and we'll get back to you!
form.footnote: Submitting this form is not a confirmation that the event will take place. Final confirmation is set with the clerk.

corporate.ctaDesc: For more details, prices and coordination — get in touch and we'll get back to you shortly.

form.submit: Send details and we'll get back to you!

notAvailable.title: This event isn't available at this branch
notAvailable.body: The event you're looking for isn't offered at the current branch. Go to all events or switch branch.

birthdays.title: Bowling birthdays with a deal
birthdays.description: A bowling game for all the kids, a dedicated host, a birthday table in the restaurant and a cake ceremony.

schedule.note: The event lasts about an hour and a half to two hours
schedule.footnote: Throughout the event, pitchers of water and cordial are provided to the kids free of charge, at no cost.

price.note: Minimum 20 participants. Extra charge for each participant above the minimum.

included: A bowling game for all the kids (50–60 min)
2 slices of family pizza + Tropit per participant
Pitchers of water and cordial throughout the event
A host for the welcome, game explanation and cake ceremony
A birthday table for all participants
includedNotes: Extra birthday portion (2 pizza slices + Tropit) — ₪ 28
The price does not include a service charge for the host
Every extra game is charged at the regular game price
birthdays.rulesFootnote: Pitchers of water and cordial are provided free of charge throughout the event. Refreshments and food in the lane area only.

policy.title: Reservation deposit
policy.desc: A ₪ 200 deposit to secure the event - deducted from the final total.

policy.title: Postponement & cancellation
policy.desc: You can postpone or cancel up to 7 days before. Less than that, the deposit is not refunded.

policy.title: December–February
policy.desc: During these months, birthdays cannot be reserved on Saturdays.

policy.title: The venue is not closed
policy.desc: The bowling alley is not closed for the event and other events may take place at the same time.

policy.title: Payment
policy.desc: Cash or credit on site only, no installments. For a single payment at the end, leave a credit card deposit.

policy.title: Commitment form
policy.desc: After paying the deposit you must sign the commitment form published on the site.

policy.title: Arrival & lanes
policy.desc: Arrive 15 min before the booking. Lane allocation is done up to 10 min.

birthdays.policyFootnote: Minimum age: 8. Submitting this form is not a confirmation that the event will take place; final confirmation is set with the clerk and per the bowling schedule.

formSummary.note: Reservation deposit: ₪ 200 (deducted from the final total)

birthdays.title: Birthday at the bowling alley
birthdays.description: A free-style celebration - bowling lanes for all the kids, a table with a cloth, pitchers of water and cordial on us at no charge, and a festive cake ceremony. The bowling alley is not closed for the event.

schedule.note: The event lasts about an hour and a half to two hours
schedule.footnote: Throughout the event, pitchers of water and cordial are provided to the kids free of charge, at no cost.

included: Bowling lanes according to the number of kids who actually arrive
A table with a cloth in the restaurant area
Pitchers of water and cordial throughout the event - at no cost
forbidden: Snacks, food and drinks from outside
Decorations on walls outside permitted areas

extras.title: Video game tickets
extras.desc: 15 min / 30 min · mini 15 tickets · prize at the end

extras.title: Signing bowling pin
extras.desc: Write wishes with durable colored markers

policy.title: Minimum age
policy.desc: Birthdays are held from age 8 and up.

policy.title: Arrival
policy.desc: Please arrive 15 minutes before the lane booking.

policy.title: The venue is not closed
policy.desc: The bowling alley is not closed for the event - other events may take place at the same time. Management does not commit to a number of lanes - it is set by the number of kids who actually arrive.

policy.title: Conduct rules
policy.desc: Kids must wear closed shoes. Kids may not run on the lane or hold balls outside the lane area. Parents must supervise the kids.

policy.title: Payment
policy.desc: Payment by credit or cash on site only - no installment option. For a single payment at the end - leave a credit card deposit at reception.

policy.title: Event confirmation
policy.desc: Submitting the form is not a confirmation that the event will take place. Final confirmation is set with the clerk and according to the bowling schedule.

team.title: An unforgettable class outing!
team.lead: The hosting and refreshments are served right to the bowling lanes - stay in the energy of the game!
team.description: A bowling game for all the kids, a dedicated host, a birthday table in the restaurant and a cake ceremony.

2 slices of family pizza + Tropit per participant
Pitchers of water and cordial throughout the event

policy.title: Reservation deposit

policy.title: Postponement & cancellation

gymboree.title: Gym-birthday
gymboree.description: Birthdays in our magical gymboree - a free hour in the space, a meal in a private room and a festive cake ceremony. Two unforgettable hours!

steps.title: Welcome
steps.desc: A host hands out entry bands per the list

steps.title: Free gymboree
steps.desc: A free hour in the magical space

steps.title: Meal in the room
steps.desc: Pizza + Tropit + pitchers of water and cordial

steps.title: Cake ceremony
steps.desc: And off home to open presents

cards.label: Sun to Sat
cards.note: Up to 20 participants · each additional child ₪ 60

included: A free hour at the gymboree (the venue is not closed for the event)
A private birthday room for two hours
Birthday portion: a slice of family pizza + Tropit per participant
Pitchers of water and cordial throughout the event in the room
A dedicated host throughout the event
allowed: Cake — only with a birthday-portions order
Decorations in the designated area only
forbidden: Pizzas from outside (the costs do not change)

extras.title: Video game tickets
extras.desc: Quarter hour / half hour · mini 15 tickets · prize at the end

extras.title: Bumper tubes
extras.desc: 4 min per round · pack of 15 participants

extras.title: Coffee vouchers
extras.desc: Pack of 10 vouchers · each additional voucher ₪ 10

policy.title: Minimum participants
policy.desc: The event is held with a minimum of 20 participants. If fewer than 20 arrive, the charge will be for 20 participants. Paid from age 0 — every child taking part in the activity is charged.

policy.title: Event duration
policy.desc: The activity lasts two hours. The birthday room is limited to two hours. After the event you may return to the gymboree according to opening hours.

policy.title: The venue is not closed
policy.desc: The gymboree and bowling alley are not closed for the event — other customers and events may take place at the same time.

policy.title: Children list
policy.desc: Prepare a list of children who will enter the gymboree. The host hands out entry bands per the list. Do not arrive more than half an hour before the event starts.

policy.title: Deposit & cancellation
policy.desc: You can postpone or cancel up to 7 days before the event — the deposit is refunded. Less than 7 days — the deposit is not refunded.

policy.title: Payment
policy.desc: Payment by credit or cash on site only, no installment option. Parents wishing to open a drinks tab will provide a security credit card with the waiter.

policy.title: Conduct rules
policy.desc: Children must follow the host's instructions. Management is not responsible for loss and/or theft on the premises. Breaking the rules gives the bowling alley the right to claim damages.

corporate.title: Corporate events
corporate.description: Our bowling alley is the perfect place for any event you can think of - from a small department of 12 people to a large company that wants the place all to itself. Bar/bat mitzvah, parties - there's everything here for everyone.

offers.title: Alcohol & atmosphere
offers.desc: A rich alcohol menu with the atmosphere, design and sound of a club.

offers.title: Custom menu
offers.desc: You can build it in advance from the venue's menu and know exactly what you get and for how much.

offers.title: Buffet with food & drinks
offers.desc: Buffet menus with unlimited food and drinks plus games - at attractive prices.

giftCardPage.title: Digital gift card
giftCardPage.subtitle: Not sure what to buy? A digital bowling gift card is always a winning idea — sent straight to email and suitable for any occasion.
giftCardPage.note: The card is valid for one year from purchase and can be redeemed on any visit.

perks.title: Sent instantly
perks.desc: The card arrives by email within minutes of purchase.

perks.title: For everyone
perks.desc: Games, food and bar — all in one place.

perks.title: Valid for a year
perks.desc: Redeem whenever you like, on any visit.
